items.title: Cap stuff from the Pacers trade and draft:
items.author: Tony East
items.body_excerpt:
Cap stuff from the Pacers trade and draft:
-Hard capped at second apron since they traded away cash
-About $2.4 million below the latest luxury tax estimate with 13 players
-About $10 million shy of the first apron (which is technically the most of MLE they can use)

items.title: It is interesting that the Minnesota Timberwolves now have the third best offensive AND defensive player in the NBA per Expected EPM
items.author: Hoop Informatics
items.body_excerpt:
It is interesting that the Minnesota Timberwolves now have the third best offensive AND defensive player in the NBA per Expected EPM

Glossary: 
EPM = Expected Plus/Minus an all-in-one player metric that predicts a player's contribution to the team found at dunksandthrees.com

images.alt:
The three most impactful OFFENSIVE
players
1. Nikola Jokic
2. Kawhi Leonard
3. LAMELO BALL
The three most impactful DEFENSIVE players
1. Victor Wembanyama
2. Ausar Thompson
3. RUDY GOBERT

items.title: Knowing nothing about a sport and having no rooting interest rules, because my kids wound up becoming die-hard Ecuador fans in the last half-hour, this win is the greatest moment of their week, and they will completely forget about it in five minutes
